steps.title: Use the policy clue
steps.content: The National Council generates laws, while the chief and cabinet devise policies and administer services in accordance with those laws. The blank must mean putting laws into practical effect.

steps.title: Choose the action verb
steps.content: Choice A means carry out or put into effect, matching the officials' role. Choice B means assume. Choice C means make up without preparation. Choice D means imitate, which does not fit administering laws. The answer is A.
